case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SONGALIA, CRISTINA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SONGALIA, CRISTINA $4,710.39 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,818.39
